sub_pixel_system.notes: No documentation available for sub-pixel system

special_mechanics.name: Diving Shoulder Roll
special_mechanics.description: Evasive maneuver allowing Harry to avoid enemy fire; removed from portable versions (Game Boy/Game Gear) due to control limitations

special_mechanics.name: Steady Aim
special_mechanics.description: Ability to keep aim steady in one direction while shooting

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Sources contain gameplay descriptions and reception commentary but no explicit physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel system documentation. Game is a top-down run-and-gun title with emphasis on shooting mechanics and evasion rather than platforming precision movement.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - True Lies (SNES)
